query:
WITH inserted AS (
                INSERT INTO user_decrypt_share (
                    gw_reference_id,
                    share_index,
                    share,
                    kms_signature,
                    extra_data
                )
                VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
                ON CONFLICT (gw_reference_id, share_index) DO NOTHING
            )
            SELECT COUNT(*) as "count!" -- The "!" tells SQLx this is never null
            FROM user_decrypt_share
            WHERE gw_reference_id = $1
